error.quota_exceeded: Your account or API key has insufficient credits.

data_description.base_url: Base URL of your running OpenAI-compatible server (e.g. http://localhost:8080/v1).

abort.entry_not_loaded: Cannot add things while the configuration is disabled.

data.max_tokens: Maximum tokens to return in response
data.name: [%key:common::config_flow::data::name%]

data_description.llm_hass_api: Select the level of control over Home Assistant.
data_description.max_tokens: Select the maximum number of tokens to return.
data_description.prompt: Instruct how the LLM should respond. This can be a template.
data_description.recommended: Select whether to use recommended model settings.
data_description.temperature: Select the temperature for response variability.
data_description.top_p: Select the top P value for response diversity.

quota_exceeded.message: Your account or API key has insufficient credits: {message}.

unsupported_file_type.message: Only images and PDF are supported by the OpenAI API, {file_path} is not an image file or PDF.
